articles.title: Twins unload on Justin Slaten as Red Sox lose 8-6 at Fenway Park
articles.description:
Chad Tracy pulled Payton Tolle at 85 pitches to set up the Slaten, Garrett Whitlock, Aroldis Chapman combination, but it backfired on him Friday night.

The post Twins unload on Justin Slaten as Red Sox lose 8-6 at Fenway Park appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost 8-6 to the Minnesota Twins at Fenway Park on May 22.
Chad Tracy's pitching decision backfired, using Justin Slaten and Garrett Whitlock.
This loss affects the Red Sox's standings and fan morale in Boston.

articles.title: Roger Clemens throws out first pitch at Fenway Park to son, Twins player Kody Clemens
articles.description:
The Red Sox gave away Roger Clemens bobbleheads to fans the same day.

The post Roger Clemens throws out first pitch at Fenway Park to son, Twins player Kody Clemens appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Roger Clemens threw the first pitch at Fenway Park on May 22, 2026.
His son, Kody Clemens, plays for the Minnesota Twins and caught the pitch.
Fans received Roger Clemens bobbleheads, enhancing the game day experience.

articles.title: SpaceX launches its biggest, most beefed-up Starship yet on a test flight
articles.description:

summary: SpaceX launched its largest Starship on May 22, enhancing its rocket technology.

Boston residents may see increased aerospace job opportunities due to SpaceX's expansion.

articles.title: Celtics’ Derrick White named to 2025-26 NBA All-Defensive First Team

articles.title: Trump veers off-topic during speech in New York
articles.description:
He went off on tangents about voter identification, crime in cities, transgender women in sports and “Dumocrats.”

summary: Trump's speech in New York included off-topic remarks on various social issues.

articles.title: Wall Street rises, households get more discouraged
articles.description:
U.S. consumers are forecasting inflation will worsen to 4.8% in the coming 12 months, up from a forecast of 4.7% last month, according to one survey.

The post Wall Street rises, households get more discouraged appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Consumers in Boston expect inflation to rise to 4.8% over the next year.
This is an increase from last month's forecast of 4.7%.
Rising inflation expectations may lead to decreased consumer spending in Boston.

articles.title: Chad Tracy provides injury updates for Garrett Crochet, Roman Anthony
articles.description:
Neither has a clear timetable for return, but Crochet will have a throwing session over the weekend followed by live batting practice next week.

The post Chad Tracy provides injury updates for Garrett Crochet, Roman Anthony appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Garrett Crochet will have a throwing session this weekend.
Crochet will follow with live batting practice next week.
No clear return timetable for Crochet and Roman Anthony affects Red Sox roster decisions.
